mapper.sql: pla.employee_id, pla.employee_class, pla.leave_reason, pla.dept_address, pla.photo_and_address, pla.work_overtime, pla.rest_overtime, pla.off_hours, pla.self_leave_date, pla.approve_leave_date, pla.card_flag, pla.not_submit_reason, pla.last_leave_date, pla.pm_admin, pla.approval_result, pla.enabled_flag, pla.oa_order, pla.approval_date, pla.approval_status, pla.id, pla.create_time, pla.create_by, pla.update_time, pla.update_by, pla.current_node, pla.current_person, pla.senior_manager_work_card, 0 as delete_flag, pla.medicalType, pla.deduction

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.employee_class as ${tAlias}_employee_class, ${tAlias}.leave_reason as ${tAlias}_leave_reason, ${tAlias}.dept_address as ${tAlias}_dept_address, ${tAlias}.photo_and_address as ${tAlias}_photo_and_address, ${tAlias}.work_overtime as ${tAlias}_work_overtime, ${tAlias}.rest_overtime as ${tAlias}_rest_overtime, ${tAlias}.off_hours as ${tAlias}_off_hours, ${tAlias}.self_leave_date as ${tAlias}_self_leave_date, ${tAlias}.approve_leave_date as ${tAlias}_approve_leave_date, ${tAlias}.card_flag as ${tAlias}_card_flag, ${tAlias}.not_submit_reason as ${tAlias}_not_submit_reason, ${tAlias}.last_leave_date as ${tAlias}_last_leave_date, ${tAlias}.pm_admin as ${tAlias}_pm_admin, ${tAlias}.approval_result as ${tAlias}_approval_result, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.oa_order as ${tAlias}_oa_order, ${tAlias}.approval_date as ${tAlias}_approval_date, ${tAlias}.approval_status as ${tAlias}_approval_status, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.current_node as ${tAlias}_current_node, ${tAlias}.current_person as ${tAlias}_current_person, ${tAlias}.senior_manager_work_card as ${tAlias}_senior_manager_work_card

select
,tpee.entry_time as entry_time ,tpec.start_time as contract_start_time ,tpec.end_time as contract_end_time ,fdev.ext_dept_name AS dept_name ,fdev.ext_department_name AS department ,fdev.ext_team_name AS team ,pej.job_name as jobName ,pej.dept_name as target_dept_name ,pe.name as name ,pe.work_card as work_card ,pe.id_number as id_number ,isnull(pett.tele, '') as emp_tele, pej.dept_id as dept_id ,pej.job_id as job_id
from pm_leave_approval pla join pm_employee_job pej on pej.employee_id = pla.employee_id and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 join pm_employee pe on pe.id = pla.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 outer apply (select top(1) pee.* from pm_employee_entry pee where pee.employee_id = pla.employee_id AND pee.enabled_flag = 1) tpee outer apply (select top(1) pec.* from pm_employee_contract pec where pec.employee_id = pla.employee_id and pec.enabled_flag = 1 and new_contract_flag = 1) tpec outer apply (SELECT TOP(1) pett_ap.* FROM pm_employee_tele pett_ap WHERE pett_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pett_ap.enabled_flag = 1 order by id desc ) pett
mapper.insert: insert into pm_leave_approval (employee_id, employee_class, leave_reason, dept_address, photo_and_address, work_overtime, rest_overtime, off_hours, self_leave_date, approve_leave_date, card_flag, not_submit_reason, last_leave_date, pm_admin, approval_result, enabled_flag, oa_order, approval_date, approval_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, current_node, current_person, senior_manager_work_card ) values (#{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leaveReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deptAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{photoAndAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workOvertime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{restOvertime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{offHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{selfLeaveDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{approveLeaveDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{cardFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{notSubmitReason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastLeaveDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{pmAdmin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{oaOrder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvalDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{approvalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} , #{currentNode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currentPerson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seniorManagerWorkCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: update pm_leave_approval set enabled_flag = 0 where id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select (select pe.work_card from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe.id = psar.market_department_emp_id) as market_dept, (select pe.work_card from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe.id = psar.market_area_emp_id) as sales_area from pm_sales_approval_relations psar where psar.enabled_flag = 1 and psar.dept_id = #{deptId, jdbcType = BIGINT}

select case when exists (select 1 from pm_leave_approval where employee_id = #{employeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and enabled_flag = 1 and isnull(oa_order, '') != '' and approval_status != 'notPass') then 1 else 0 end
select pe.name,pla.* from pm_leave_approval pla,pm_employee pe where pla.approval_status=#{approvalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and pla.enabled_flag=1 and pla.employee_id=pe.id
select count(*) from pm_leave_approval where approval_status=#{approvalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and enabled_flag=1
